Hero.description: Safe choices don't win markets. We engineer the tech that runs your business and the marketing that scales it to give your brand an unfair, undeniable advantage.

RealityCheck.text: You’ve hit a wall. The tactics that got you here are now breaking your infrastructure. Your code is crumbling under the traffic, or your marketing is failing to bring it in.

Contact.title: Let's cut the small talk.
Contact.subtext: Tell us what's broken or what you want to conquer. If it's ambitious, we're in. If it's boring, we'll pass.
Contact.holding_back: is holding us back. We need someone who can
Contact.error_text: A technical glitch almost let your project slip away. We shouldn't let that happen. Don't let a minor error be the end of this.

Arsenal.build_description: Custom Software, High-Performance Hosting, and SaaS infrastructures that don't crash when traffic spikes.
Arsenal.growth_description: A great product is useless if nobody uses it. We engineer the attention your brand deserves. From cut-throat performance marketing to seamless fulfillment—we make sure the market pays attention. And pays you.

EnterpriseBento.section_headline: Built for Europe's most valuable brand.<sup1>1</sup1>
EnterpriseBento.nda_hint: Further undisclosed market leaders under NDA
EnterpriseBento.card1_headline: Scaling sales operations for T-Mobile on a national level.<sup2>2</sup2>
EnterpriseBento.card2_text: Built for real-time customer interactions. This means zero tolerance for lag or errors. The tool never gets in the way. High-speed performance wasn't a feature—it was the core design principle.
EnterpriseBento.card3_text: Engineered for non-stop use across Germany. The frontend is effortlessly intuitive, while the backend is a digital fortress. Full access control, strict compliance, and maximum resilience.

Legal.privacy_content:
1. Data Protection at a Glance
We take the protection of your personal data very seriously. We treat your personal data confidentially and in accordance with the statutory data protection regulations and this privacy policy.

2. Data Collection on Our Website
We only store a strictly necessary cookie to save your language preference. No third-party trackers are running without your consent.

3. Your Rights
You have the right to receive information about the origin, recipient, and purpose of your stored personal data at any time free of charge.
Legal.terms_content:
1. Scope of Application
These Terms of Service apply to all interactions with Buff.

2. Services Provided
We provide technical backbone, creative punch, and strategic clarity.

3. Liability
We build high-performance products. If it breaks, we fix it.

4. Final Provisions
Stop accepting average stuff.

Footer.title: We are Buff.
Footer.description: We provide the technical backbone, the creative punch, and the strategic clarity your brand is currently missing.

Growth.hero_description: Your ad budget is currently going down the drain. We build funnels that turn every click into profit. No guessing, just math.
Growth.diagnosis_headline: The problem isn't your product. It's your <sup1>translation.</sup1>

Footnotes.note1: Based on the 2026 'Brand Finance Global 500' report, which ranks Deutsche Telekom as the most valuable brand in Europe.
Footnotes.note2: Refers to the development and nationwide rollout of a multifunctional consulting tool for employees of Deutsche Telekom Service GmbH.

GrowthArsenal.title: The Arsenal
GrowthArsenal.card1_text: We tear down your current funnels, analyze your unit economics, and build a customized growth blueprint. No guessing. Just math and market psychology.
GrowthArsenal.card2_title: We don't buy clicks. We buy customers.
GrowthArsenal.card2_text: Cross-platform media buying engineered to dominate your niche. We turn ad platforms from a gamble into a predictable revenue engine.
GrowthArsenal.card3_text: Ad copy that converts and funnels that don't leak. We handle the entire creative fulfillment. Perfectly aligned with the technical infrastructure.

GrowthParadigm.title: How we
GrowthParadigm.subtext: We've optimized every layer of the growth engine to prioritize what actually moves the needle.
GrowthParadigm.legacy_1_text: Optimizing for impressions, reach, and likes. These metrics look great in a boardroom PDF, but they don't solve your customer acquisition cost (CAC).
GrowthParadigm.legacy_2_text: Taking 4–6 weeks to launch a "perfect" campaign. By the time it goes live, you’ve already burned a month of budget while the market has evolved.
GrowthParadigm.legacy_3_text: Monthly summaries explaining why performance was average. It’s information you can’t act on, delivered long after the damage is done.
GrowthParadigm.buff_1_text: We ignore vanity metrics and obsess over your margins. We bridge the gap between media spend and bank balance, ensuring every $1 spent returns profit.
GrowthParadigm.buff_2_text: 24-hour test-to-deploy cycles. We find the winning creative and profitable funnels while your competitors are still debating guidelines in meetings.
GrowthParadigm.buff_3_text: Zero PDFs. We provide live dashboards that track the ground truth of your business. Real-time clarity into your growth engine, accessible anywhere.
GrowthParadigm.footer_text: The result? A predictable, technical advantage over your market.

GrowthGate.title: Can you handle the scale?
GrowthGate.subtext: Aggressive marketing only works if your backend and fulfillment can survive a massive spike in demand. If your operations are ready for a ruthless scale-up, pitch us your current bottleneck.
GrowthGate.success_text: Our architecture team will analyze your bottleneck and contact you within 24 hours.
GrowthGate.form_bottleneck_placeholder: Describe the friction keeping you from the next tier...

Build.hero_description: Most agencies build MVPs that collapse under pressure. We engineer enterprise-grade custom software, bulletproof SaaS infrastructures, and high-performance managed hosting. We build systems that don't crash when it actually matters.
Build.diagnosis_headline: Bad software forces you to <sup1>compromise your business.</sup1>
Build.cap_frontend_text: Your off-the-shelf tools are a bottleneck. We rip out failing legacy code and architect custom software that actually does what you need it to do. Brutally fast, perfectly aligned, and built to scale without compromises.
Build.cap_saas_text: A traffic spike shouldn't mean a server outage. We engineer highly resilient SaaS applications that handle massive concurrency without flinching. Built for scale, optimized for absolute zero-latency execution.
Build.cap_infra_text: We don't trust cheap infrastructure. We collaborate directly with top-tier hosters to provide high-performance, strictly managed environments. Total security, maximum uptime, zero excuses.
Build.std_1_text: Latency kills conversions. We write clean, aggressive code optimized for the fastest possible execution. No bloated frameworks, no lazy workarounds. Just raw speed.
Build.std_2_text: We build custom solutions on open standards. You own the IP. You own the codebase. We stay as your execution partner because you want us to, not because you're trapped.
Build.std_3_text: We despise temporary tech trends. We architect systems designed to scale from 100 to 100,000 concurrent users effortlessly. Do it right the first time, or don't do it at all.
Build.cta_subtext: Bring us your failing legacy system, your scaling bottlenecks, or your vision for a market-dominating SaaS. We will dismantle the problem and engineer the exact solution. No excuses.
Build.form_challenge_placeholder: Describe your current bottleneck or vision...

MegaMenu.build_text: Stop patching. Start engineering. Custom, scalable infrastructure designed for raw performance.
MegaMenu.growth_text: Ruthless, mathematical approach to capturing market share and eliminating CAC bleed.
MegaMenu.audit_text: Not sure? Get a personalized recommendation within seconds.
